actors.name: Donald Trump
actors.blurb: Donald Trump remains the central figure in right-wing and far-right news cycles due to multiple recent assassination attempts, his administration's policies, and his influence on global right-wing movements. The latest incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner has intensified media scrutiny and international reactions, further cementing his prominence in political discourse.

actors.name: Santiago Abascal
actors.blurb: Santiago Abascal continues to drive significant coverage as Vox's leader, particularly through his party's push for 'national priority' policies in regional governments and his confrontational rhetoric against the Spanish government and the Catholic Church. His actions have sparked debates on immigration, regional autonomy, and the role of far-right parties in Spanish politics.

actors.name: Giorgia Meloni
actors.blurb: Giorgia Meloni remains a key figure in European right-wing politics, with recent coverage focusing on her government's policies, her stance on international issues like the Iran conflict and NATO, and her responses to political violence. Her leadership continues to shape Italy's domestic and foreign policy, particularly in relation to migration and EU fiscal rules.

actors.name: Péter Magyar
actors.role: Leader of Tisza Party (Hungary), Prime Minister-designate
actors.blurb: Péter Magyar has rapidly ascended as a defining figure in Hungarian politics following his party's landslide victory. His actions, including negotiations with the EU over frozen funds, cabinet appointments, and criticisms of the previous government, have dominated recent coverage. His leadership is reshaping Hungary's political landscape and its relationship with the EU.

actors.name: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD)
actors.blurb: The AfD continues to generate significant coverage due to its rising poll numbers, internal controversies, and its impact on German politics. Recent articles highlight its record-high polling, expulsions of controversial members, and its influence on local and state elections. The party's stance on immigration and its relationship with other political entities remain key discussion points.
